title: rhinanthus serotinus var. aestivalis
intro: Rhinanthus serotinus var. aestivalis, also known as the Aestival Twisted Spurge or Summer-rhinanthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by connecting to the roots of other plants, typically grasses. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to help with wound healing, reducing fever, and relieving digestive issues. Rhinanthus serotinus var. aestivalis can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
